assertions.title: Action validated against guardrails before execution

steps.action: Run targeted Vitest coverage for AI selector safety and executor guardrail handling.
steps.expected: A forbidden selector action fails with GUARDRAIL_VIOLATION / FORBIDDEN_ACTION before execution and a terminal guardrail milestone is captured.
steps.observed: `src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts > aiActionSelector safety wiring > surfaces FORBIDDEN_ACTION when the AI selector returns a forbidden action` passed, and `src/runExecutor.test.ts > runExecutor > captures a final terminal milestone when a guardrail violation stops the run` passed.

testNames: src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts > aiActionSelector safety wiring > surfaces FORBIDDEN_ACTION when the AI selector returns a forbidden action
src/runExecutor.test.ts > runExecutor > captures a final terminal milestone when a guardrail violation stops the run
evidence.command: bunx vitest run src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts src/runExecutor.test.ts src/guardrails.test.ts --reporter=verbose

assertions.title: Falls back to heuristic on LLM failure

steps.action: Run the targeted safety suite with a mocked LLM rejection path.
steps.expected: The handler falls back to the heuristic selector and the run completes instead of crashing.
steps.observed: `src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts > aiActionSelector safety wiring > falls back and completes the run when the default AI selector throws` passed.

testNames: src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts > aiActionSelector safety wiring > falls back and completes the run when the default AI selector throws
evidence.command: bunx vitest run src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts src/runExecutor.test.ts src/guardrails.test.ts --reporter=verbose

steps.action: Run selector and guardrail tests with restrictive allowedActions and forbiddenActions.
steps.expected: The selector falls back to an allowed action and runtime guardrails reject disallowed action types.
steps.observed: `src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts > aiActionSelector safety wiring > never returns an action outside taskSpec.allowedActions` passed, and `src/guardrails.test.ts > isActionAllowed > blocks actions that are outside the runtime allowlist` passed.

testNames: src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts > aiActionSelector safety wiring > never returns an action outside taskSpec.allowedActions
src/guardrails.test.ts > isActionAllowed > blocks actions that are outside the runtime allowlist
evidence.command: bunx vitest run src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts src/runExecutor.test.ts src/guardrails.test.ts --reporter=verbose

assertions.title: Navigation guardrail enforced on goto URLs

steps.action: Run the targeted suites covering blocked goto actions and domain allowlist enforcement.
steps.expected: A goto to a non-allowlisted domain fails with GUARDRAIL_VIOLATION / DOMAIN_BLOCKED before page.goto executes.
steps.observed: `src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts > aiActionSelector safety wiring > surfaces DOMAIN_BLOCKED when the AI selector returns goto for a blocked domain`, `src/runExecutor.test.ts > runExecutor > blocks out-of-domain navigation before page.goto is called`, and `src/guardrails.test.ts > validateNavigation > blocks subdomains that are not exact allowlist matches` all passed.

testNames: src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts > aiActionSelector safety wiring > surfaces DOMAIN_BLOCKED when the AI selector returns goto for a blocked domain
src/runExecutor.test.ts > runExecutor > blocks out-of-domain navigation before page.goto is called
src/guardrails.test.ts > validateNavigation > blocks subdomains that are not exact allowlist matches
evidence.command: bunx vitest run src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts src/runExecutor.test.ts src/guardrails.test.ts --reporter=verbose

steps.action: Run the targeted safety suite with a stalled AI selector and short timeout.
steps.expected: The selector aborts the stalled LLM path and falls back within the configured time budget.
steps.observed: `src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts > aiActionSelector safety wiring > falls back within the timeout budget when the AI selector stalls` passed.

testNames: src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts > aiActionSelector safety wiring > falls back within the timeout budget when the AI selector stalls
evidence.command: bunx vitest run src/aiActionSelectorSafety.test.ts src/runExecutor.test.ts src/guardrails.test.ts --reporter=verbose

summary: Validated 5 assigned AI selector safety assertions via targeted Vitest coverage; all 5 passed with no blockers or frictions. The targeted command passed 44/44 tests across aiActionSelectorSafety, runExecutor, and guardrails suites.
